title: carex abrupta
intro: Carex abrupta, also known as sudden sedge, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, making it a potential remedy for gastrointestinal issues. Carex abrupta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it has been traditionally used to treat various health concerns, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues.
